\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}

\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \epsilon_n = \frac{ \| \,| \mathcal{P}[ \psi_n]|^2 - I_{ \text{target}} \|_2}{ \|I_{ \text{target}} \|_2} \end{equation}
